titleStmt.title: SII 16.8: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 8. (A.R. No. 257 of 1905.) TRIPURĀNTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up to the east of the Chīkaṭimidde of the Tripurāntakēśvara temple.
The details of the date, viz., Śaka 1308, Kshaya, Kārtika śu. 15, Monday, (Mahākārtika), regularly correspond to 1386 A.D., November 5, f.d.t. °83.

It records that Bhavadūra Oḍeya, the Mahāpradhāna of Vīra Harihararāya bought land of the extent of four tūmus, two for a flower garden and two for paddy cultivation, for a sum of 200 Śiṅgāya-māḍas from Bhikshāvṛitti Siddayadēvayyaṅgāru and made it over as a gift to God Tripurāntaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1308 Agu kṣayasaṁvatsara kā¨rttika śu 15 sō . mahā
kā¨rttikapuṇyakālamaṁdu svastiśrī śrīpa¨rvvataśirōmaṇi śrīkumāragi
ri śrīttripurāṁtaka śrīmadmahādēvaraku sāyaṁkālamaṁdula Oka
Avasaramu pūjaUpahārālaku svastiśrī śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra harihararāyani mahāpra
dhānuleyina svastiśrīmatu bhavadūra Oḍayalu śrītripurā
ṁtakakṣētramaṁdu bhikṣāvritti śiddhayadēvayyaṁgāri cētanu
yinnūṟu śiṁgāyamāḍalaku krayamugāṁgonna
kṣēttramu kēsaripāṭini puṣpālatoṁṭaku na 2 nē varipola
muku na 2 nē verasi na 4 cēnu dhārāpū¨rvvakamugānu
Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamugānu sama¨rppiṁciri maṁgaḷamahāśrī
śrīśrī svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradatānu
pālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa . svadattaṁ niḥ
palaṁ bavēt .
Digital edition of SII 16.8 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
